channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: fc8ad4e2-40e4-4724-8317-bcda7503ecbf
Display name: Customer Delegated Admin Relationship Administrator
Description: Manage all aspects of granular delegated admin privileges (GDAP) relationships in a customer tenant.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/fc8ad4e2-40e4-4724-8317-bcda7503ecbf

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: eda8c187-a7d5-42cb-b2e1-c9142f63899f
Display name: EngagementExport.Read.All
Description: Export Viva Engage data
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/eda8c187-a7d5-42cb-b2e1-c9142f63899f

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: f1f5e9aa-ad18-4b97-883e-6aa7e95b7a5f
Display name: Place.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write organization places
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/f1f5e9aa-ad18-4b97-883e-6aa7e95b7a5f

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: e9e1b87a-726e-4628-8fab-d1fc58d4d9ad
Display name: TeamworkSection.Read.All
Description: Read all users' sections
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/e9e1b87a-726e-4628-8fab-d1fc58d4d9ad

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: fd99f9da-42d6-4d00-8a41-4161bea42309
Display name: TeamworkSection.ReadWrite.All
Description: Read and write all users' sections
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/fd99f9da-42d6-4d00-8a41-4161bea42309

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 50a8bf5f-b06a-4ac7-881f-3ca0c4be7550
Display name: WindowsUpdates.Read.All
Description: Read all Windows update deployment settings
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/50a8bf5f-b06a-4ac7-881f-3ca0c4be7550
